n: Book 13, Chapter 5: The Myth of the Monster

steps.t: Saija is at Näky-kolo north west of Kuru-leiri. Yrjänä instructed you to seek the wisdom of Saija in order to find Narchuil.
The body of the sea-monster Saija spoke of lies in the Ice-bay of Forochel, east of Kuru-leiri. Saija directed you to seek Narchuil or news of it upon…
Arvedui haunts the wreckage of a great Elf-ship frozen in the Ice-bay of Forochel. You have discovered the shade of Arvedui, the last king of Arthedai…
